title: Started Web Development
description: Began learning HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Built first static websites and fell in love with the craft.

title: First Trading Account
description: Opened first brokerage account. Started studying technical analysis, price action, and market structure.

title: First Game Jam
description: Participated in a 48-hour game jam using Godot. Shipped a playable prototype and caught the game dev bug.

title: Algorithmic Trading
description: Wrote first automated trading strategy in Python. Backtested across 5 years of data with positive expectancy.

title: Full-Stack Projects
description: Expanded into Node.js and databases. Shipped first full-stack web application with real users.

title: Indie Game Release
description: Released first indie game on itch.io. Received positive feedback and 500+ downloads in the first month.

title: Three Worlds Converge
description: Trading, web development, and game creation are now deeply intertwined. Building at the intersection of all three.
